replies.msg:
好用嘅文宣。

小小意見/討論：

用 Holocaust 定 massacre？

Holocaust 字典解釋係
https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/holocaust

1 : a sacrifice consumed by fire
2 : a thorough destruction involving extensive loss of life especially through fire
3a usually the Holocaust : the mass slaughter of European civilians and especially Jews by the Nazis during World War II
b : a mass slaughter of people, especially : GENOCIDE

你張圖係六四，用 massacre 係咪適合啲？

全球「和尼畫」
#XinniethePooh Challenge
https://lihkg.com/thread/1640322/page/1




「和尼畫」挑戰
1.畫出你心中所想的維尼圖
2.留下你想對習維尼講嘅說話
3.放上ig、fb、twitter，tag #XinniethePooh
4.tag 1-3個你想佢一齊畫維尼嘅朋友
5.被tag嘅朋友一齊畫維尼，讓愛與維尼佔領地球，推到畀習維尼本人見到

"Xinnie the Pooh" Challenge
1. Draw your own "Xinnie the Pooh"
2. Write down what do you want to tell Chairman Xi
3. Post your work on ig, fb and twitter with tag #Xinniethepooh
4. Tag up to 3 more friends to draw together!

Twitter英文文宣：警察嚴重罪案一覽
同我推爆Twitter佢

PAGE1


PAGE2


quote晒新聞出處, 內文亦係新聞cap.
藍絲五毛即管fact check

警隊近年無論在當值或休班, 犯罪率不斷攀升
示威時被拍攝到各種暴力, 性罪行, 插贓嫁禍,
只不過係過往一連串警隊管理問題的前身

2008 旺角警署強姦案
